channel.title: Video Intros :: K-State CS Textbook Extras
channel.description: Tip To get access to any of the MS Teams, YouTube channels, or online tools that are needed for this project, contact Russ Feldhausen or another faculty. Step 0 - Acquire New Intros The new intros are currently in the Computational Core Faculty MS Team Folder under Documents > Video Editing > CS Zero > New AI Intros:
